title: Turkish Kunefe: A Richly Flaky Pastry with Sweet Cheese
description: Indulge in the rich flavors of Turkish kunefe, a crispy pastry filled with sweet cheese. Perfect as a dessert or snack.

ingredients.name: Kunefe pastry
ingredients.notes: available at Middle Eastern grocery stores

ingredients.name: Turkish delight
ingredients.notes: or other sweet treat of your choice

instructions: Cut the kunefe pastry into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes.
Place the cubes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the butter over the pastry cubes.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
While the pastry is baking, crumble the cheese into a bowl.
Once the pastry is done, remove it from the oven and let it cool slightly.
In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the crumbled cheese and cook, stirring constantly, until melted and golden brown.
Add the Turkish delight and stir to combine.
Transfer the cheese mixture to a serving dish.
Arrange the baked pastry cubes on top of the cheese mixture.
Drizzle with honey and sprinkle with cinnamon, if desired.
